violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered, with overflowing cardboard and missing covers. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. FMC has expired and must reinstate. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces, vegetables) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Staff relocated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Ice disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

A container of cooked noodles was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Inspector observed the noodles were stored above the fill line. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Packages of Goyoza dumplings were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC placed in refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

Various foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in; a container of fryer oil was observed stored on the ground. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -under prep unit hood -walk-in gaskets. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
